---
title: "The Rt. Rev. William Alexander"
---

## The Rt. Rev. William Alexander

**Dates:** (1824-1911)

### Description

Dean of Emly (1864) Bishop of Derry (1867), later (1896) Archbishop of Armagh; husband of the hymn-writer Mrs. Cecil Frances Alexander.

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th [1874]
- Letter from July 20 1867
- Letter from <span class=‘strike’>March</span> April 1st [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
